chain.thought: Explanation: Earth-Man’s membership notes state that his pre-crisis version first appeared under the name “Absorbency Boy” and later became known as Earth-Man. Therefore, he is the character who first existed under a certain name and then became something else.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table shows that Earth-Man (Kirt Niedrigh) “pre-crisis version first appeared (as ‘Absorbency Boy’)” and later is known as Earth-Man. This matches the description of a pre-crisis character who first existed under a certain name and then became something else.
